v1.0.0.name: NN-98
v1.0.0.notes: Initial neural network model with 98 features from JeffSackmann data.

v1.1.0.name: NN-143
v1.1.0.notes: Expanded to 143 features: added 60+ temporal features (form trends, surface adaptation, H2H, fatigue metrics). Major feature engineering overhaul.

v1.1.1.name: NN-143-SURFACE_FIX
v1.1.1.notes: Fixed surface experience cap bug and Peak_Age column naming mismatch. Static round-day offset heuristic (assumed Monday start for all tournaments). Production accuracy: 22/34 (64.7%) vs market 55.9%. Historical metrics are preserved, but the exact artifact file is no longer available in-repo.

v1.2.0.name: NN-141-DYNAMIC_OFFSETS
v1.2.0.notes: Dynamic round-day offset heuristic (anchored on 'finals are Sunday', adapts to actual start dow). Removed duplicate Peak_Age_P1/P2 (143->141). Single source of truth for offsets in round_offsets.py. M/64 all treated as 1-week (bug — Madrid/Rome should be 2-week). Static qualifier offsets per level.

v1.2.1.name: NN-141-DYNAMIC_OFFSETS_v2
v1.2.1.notes: Fixed M/64 Masters detection: non-Monday start (Madrid/Rome/Shanghai) now correctly treated as 2-week events. Dynamic qualifier offsets: counts actual qualifier rounds per tournament in training data instead of using static per-level defaults. Verified against real Bovada dates for Miami 2026 (all rounds exact) and Zadar/Murcia CH 2026 (all rounds exact including Q1). Historical calibration artifact support exists, but raw probabilities remain the promoted live mode until a calibrated variant earns its own version bump. The generic current files still mirror this release for compatibility with older scripts.

v1.3.0.name: NN-141-FIXED_SPLIT-CANDIDATE
v1.3.0.notes: Retrained with honest chronological split: train < 2022-01-01, validation = 2022, test >= 2023-01-01. Saved as a registry-tracked candidate instead of the live current NN because it was slightly worse than v1.2.1 on offline metrics and the live NN still needs further calibration/extreme-prediction review.

v1.0.0.name: XGB-143-SURFACE_FIX
v1.0.0.notes: Initial XGBoost model trained on same JeffSackmann SURFACE_FIX dataset. Used 143 features (including duplicate Peak_Age_P1/P2).

v1.1.0.name: XGB-141-SURFACE_FIX
v1.1.0.notes: Retrained on 141 features (removed duplicate Peak_Age_P1/P2, same feature set as NN v1.2.1). This is the pre-fixed-split promoted tree artifact and is retained as the archived reference point before the 2026-04-23 honest train/validation/test retrain.

v1.2.0.name: XGB-141-FIXED_SPLIT
v1.2.0.notes: Retrained with honest chronological split: train < 2022-01-01, validation = 2022, test >= 2023-01-01. Validation winner was balanced_depth6. Promoted because training protocol changed, even though headline metrics moved only slightly.

v1.0.0.name: RF-143-SURFACE_FIX
v1.0.0.notes: Initial Random Forest model trained on same JeffSackmann SURFACE_FIX dataset. Used 143 features (including duplicate Peak_Age_P1/P2).

v1.1.0.name: RF-141-SURFACE_FIX
v1.1.0.notes: Retrained on 141 features (removed duplicate Peak_Age_P1/P2, same feature set as NN v1.2.1). This is the pre-fixed-split promoted tree artifact and is retained as the archived reference point before the 2026-04-23 honest train/validation/test retrain.

v1.2.0.name: RF-141-FIXED_SPLIT
v1.2.0.notes: Retrained with honest chronological split: train < 2022-01-01, validation = 2022, test >= 2023-01-01. Validation winner was rf_depth15_currentish. Promoted because training protocol changed, even though headline metrics moved only slightly.
